bindings.title: Kendang cluster
bindings.excerpt: The main drum cluster carries the social-rhythmic center of the Bajidoran floor.
bindings.source_title: Bajidoran / Jaipong Ujang Lanay Di STSI
bindings.source_summary: A live performance source grounding the page in communal rhythm, dancers, and instrument-led routing.
bindings.source_image_alt: YouTube thumbnail for Bajidoran / Jaipong Ujang Lanay Di STSI

bindings.title: Selendang cluster
bindings.excerpt: The cloth-and-body hero maps to Jaipongan’s dance vocabulary and social charge.
bindings.source_summary: Background on Jaipongan’s development, instrumentation, choreography, and social implications in West Java.
bindings.source_image_alt: Screenshot of the Jaipongan Wikipedia page

bindings.title: Suling rack
bindings.excerpt: The flute pocket ties the room to the broader palette of Sundanese musical instruments.
bindings.source_summary: An overview of Sundanese music and instruments including suling, angklung, gamelan, and kendang.
bindings.source_image_alt: Screenshot of the Sundanese music Wikipedia page

bindings.title: Kecrek pair
bindings.excerpt: A secondary rhythm pocket pulled from the same live floor source.
bindings.source_title: Bajidoran / Jaipong Ujang Lanay Di STSI
bindings.source_summary: The performance source shows how rhythm sections and cueing circulate across the communal floor.
bindings.source_image_alt: YouTube thumbnail for Bajidoran / Jaipong Ujang Lanay Di STSI

bindings.title: Community banner
bindings.excerpt: The troupe banner pocket points back to Gugum Gumbira’s role in shaping the form and its public identity.
bindings.source_summary: Biography of the choreographer and composer who developed Jaipongan from rural dance and festival music.
bindings.source_image_alt: Screenshot of the Gugum Gumbira Wikipedia page

bindings.title: Floor diagram
bindings.excerpt: The floor-plan pocket translates choreography and embodied routing into a stage object.
bindings.source_summary: The page explains instrumentation, choreography, and how Jaipongan organizes bodies, drums, and social motion.
bindings.source_image_alt: Screenshot of the Jaipongan Wikipedia page

bindings.title: Set list
bindings.excerpt: The handwritten set-list pocket folds repertoire and troupe history into the room.
bindings.source_summary: Context for Jaipongan’s public debut, Jugala, and the movement from village forms into stage circulation.
bindings.source_image_alt: Screenshot of the Gugum Gumbira Wikipedia page

bindings.title: Sound system
bindings.excerpt: The speaker stack keeps the edition from becoming a static heritage diorama by acknowledging live amplification and circulation.
bindings.source_summary: A broader view of the ensemble ecology behind Sundanese performance, from bamboo instruments to percussion and larger setups.
bindings.source_image_alt: Screenshot of the Sundanese music Wikipedia page
